---
title: "My answers"
author: "My name"
date: "2024-03-03"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# Write your answer here
```


#### Working with Data

(@) Import the dataset `Soccer_Table_2014-2015.csv` into `R` . (Thanks to Kirsten Spencer who supplied the dataset.)

\fontsize{8}{8}

```{r}
# Write your answer here
```


\fontsize{11}{11}

(@) Compare the summary statistics of goal difference `GD` between the home and away league tables.

\fontsize{8}{8}

```{r}
# Write your answer here
```


\fontsize{11}{11}

(@) Which one has more variation?

```{r}
# Write your answer here
```


(@) Compare the relationship of number of wins and goal difference between the home and away games.

```{r}
# Write your answer here
```


#### Further practice

You can practice more with other leagues in other countries from the file. You can also find more data from the `kaggle` open datasets (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets).
